The 2nd lord being combust did not give the native very high
education but the 8th lord in the 6t" house gave her a lot of courage,
success and capacity to become a cabinet minister. It may be seen that

In her case Gaja Kesari Yoga, Adhi Yoga and Utkrishta Raja Yoga
have became Anubhava Yogas but these have manifested onty during
Guru oasa, Guru and Sani Antar oasas.
An astrologer should not be carried away by too many benefic
Yogas alene in any horoscope.
